category_sources: source_facts.description says DjVu viewer; official DjVuLibre homepage describes an open source DjVu implementation with viewers, browser plugins, decoders, encoders, and utilities.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and project text use DjVuLibre; source_facts.name is djvulibre.
docs_sources: Official DjVuLibre documentation index provides man pages for the command-line tools and links to technical papers/tutorials; homepage documents project scope.
repo_sources: Official DjVuLibre homepage links Browse Git to SourceForge; SourceForge hosts the Djvulibre-git source browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.executable list; official homepage says DjVuLibre includes a viewer, plugin, full DjVu utilities, decoders, encoders, and C++ reference library.
